prompt:
Write a piece of neural network prediction code that establishes a relationship between inputs and outputs, and saves this mapping relationship to a pkl model. Utilize the input dataset from "input_data.csv", which contains 500 rows and 12 columns (each row represents a set of inputs). The known outputs are in "output_data.csv", a matrix with 7 rows and 500 columns. Ensure the data dimensions are automatically corresponded.

Use the data to train the model and save the parameters in "model.pkl" and output model evaluation results in "evaluation_results.csv" (with columns "Loss" and "MeanAbsoluteError").
expected: 1. Data cleaning and preprocessing: Data Completeness — input (500x12) and output (7x500, transposed to 500x7) dimensions handled correctly. 2. Predictive modeling: Model Performance (MAE) — neural network trained, model.pkl saved via pickle/joblib. 3. Report generation: Report Quality — evaluation_results.csv with Loss and MeanAbsoluteError columns.
